item.title: Master the 60-Second Rule 🎯 • Use: “I increased sales by 30% in Q2.” • Prepare a clear story arc: problem, action, result. • Practice with a timer to keep answers under 60 seconds. • Focus on relevant achievements only. • Avoid filler words to maintain clarity. How will you ensure your interview answers are concise and impactful? #interview #communication #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Master the 60-Second Rule 🎯 • Use: “I increased sales by 30% in Q2.” • Prepare a clear story arc: problem, action, result. • Practice with a timer to keep answers under 60 seconds. • Focus on relevant achievements only. • Avoid filler words to maintain clarity. How will you ensure your interview answers are concise and impactful? #interview #communication #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
